_meta.description: Isolated facts: arbitrary values with NO entailment links to any other stored fact. Recovery after deletion can only be RESIDUAL SURVIVAL (a derived artifact still contains it), never re-derivation. Parametric risk rho is ~0 by construction (values are synthetic). All persons are fictional.

fields.subject: who the fact is about
fields.text: canonical third-person statement of the fact
fields.utterance: natural first/third-person phrasing fed to the memory system
fields.probe_value: the discriminating token(s) a probe must surface to count as recovered

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen's emergency contact phone number is +65-9123-4567.
facts.utterance: By the way, please remember my emergency contact number is +65-9123-4567.
facts.note: Phone number is arbitrary; no other stored fact implies it.

facts.subject: Bob Tan
facts.text: Bob Tan is allergic to penicillin.
facts.utterance: Noting for travel plans: my colleague Bob Tan is allergic to penicillin.
facts.note: Specific allergen is arbitrary among many; not inferable from other facts.

facts.subject: Carol Lim
facts.text: Carol Lim's blood type is AB negative.
facts.utterance: My friend Carol Lim's blood type is AB negative, in case it ever comes up.
facts.note: Blood type is arbitrary; not derivable from other stored facts.

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen's DBS savings account number is 012-34567-8.
facts.utterance: Save my DBS savings account number: 012-34567-8.

facts.subject: Bob Tan
facts.text: Bob Tan's home address is Blk 123 Ang Mo Kio Ave 6, #08-456.
facts.utterance: Bob Tan lives at Blk 123 Ang Mo Kio Ave 6, #08-456 — keep it for the courier.

facts.subject: Carol Lim
facts.text: Carol Lim's favourite cuisine is Peranakan food.
facts.utterance: Carol Lim absolutely loves Peranakan food — her favourite cuisine.
facts.note: Preference is arbitrary; not implied by other facts.

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen parks her car at lot B2-17 in her condo carpark.
facts.utterance: My condo parking lot is B2-17, remember that.

facts.subject: Bob Tan
facts.text: Bob Tan's car licence plate is SGY 4821 X.
facts.utterance: Bob Tan drives the car with plate SGY 4821 X.

facts.subject: Carol Lim
facts.text: Carol Lim takes 50 mg of sertraline daily.
facts.utterance: Carol Lim takes 50 mg sertraline every day — noting it for her.
facts.note: Medication/dose is arbitrary; not implied by other stored facts.

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen's debit card PIN is 7392.
facts.utterance: My debit card PIN is 7392, keep it safe.

facts.subject: Bob Tan
facts.text: Bob Tan's pet cat is named Mochi.
facts.utterance: Bob Tan has a pet cat called Mochi.

facts.subject: Carol Lim
facts.text: Carol Lim's home wifi password is RainbowTiger88.
facts.utterance: Carol Lim's home wifi password is RainbowTiger88.
